name: Cheery Cherry Punch
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed (one 12-ounce can)
12 ounces frozen lemonade concentrate, thawed (one 12-ounce can)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin and sugar in boiling water.
2. Add pineapple juice, orange juice concentrates, and cold water; mix well.
3. Freeze the mixture until set.
4. Just before serving, add ginger ale and mix well.
Makes 60 servings of 4-ounce each.
